svg.title: The path to co-evolution — three-step loop
svg.desc: Three panels in a triangle around the OneBrain mark: 01 CAPTURE (/braindump) at top, 02 EVOLVE (/distill, /learn) at bottom-right, 03 WRAPUP (/wrapup, /recap) at bottom-left. Dashed arrows flow clockwise between them — the recurring co-evolution loop.
